mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM article WHERE id = #{articleId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status = 'PUBLISHED' AND visibility = 'PUBLIC' )

SELECT a.like_count, a.comment_count, EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM article_like al WHERE al.article_id = a.id AND al.anonymous_key_hash = #{anonymousKeyHash} ) AS liked FROM article a WHERE a.id = #{articleId} AND a.deleted_at IS NULL AND a.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND a.visibility = 'PUBLIC' LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO article_like (article_id, anonymous_key_hash) VALUES (#{articleId}, #{anonymousKeyHash})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM article_like WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND anonymous_key_hash = #{anonymousKeyHash}
